intro: A gateway-led implementation plan derived from the LSIS-AFS deliverables, progressing from architecture and code generation through validation, interoperability, and final submission.

milestones.title: Foundation
milestones.summary: Lock down architecture, compliance planning, and the spreading-code generation baseline.
deliverables: Spreading-code generation plan aligned to Annex data

milestones.title: Encoding
milestones.summary: Implement forward error correction and complete navigation message framing for valid 12-second frames.
deliverables: BCH, LDPC, CRC, and interleaving infrastructure
Navigation frame assembly with sync pattern
Validation of frame timing and symbol counts

milestones.title: Signal generation
milestones.summary: Turn encoded frames into synchronized baseband I/Q output ready for testing and comparison.
deliverables: Tiered code assembly across primary, secondary, and tertiary layers
BPSK modulation for AFS-I and AFS-Q
Exportable binary and CSV signal files

milestones.title: Workshop checkpoint
milestones.summary: Prepare an interop-ready encode pipeline and demo narrative for the Goonhilly Earth Station workshop.
deliverables: Workshop-ready explanation of the protocol stack

milestones.title: Decoding
milestones.summary: Recover frames, parse messages, and validate round-trip decoding against the specification.

milestones.title: Integration and submission
milestones.summary: Complete end-to-end validation, documentation, and the final competition delivery before 31 August 2026.
deliverables: Integrated validation across the full pipeline
Submission package for the closing deadline
